title: Conclude with implication
subtitle: Say what your argument means in practice.
overview: Say what your argument means in practice.
Module: Argument and Structure. B2 Bridge moves from strong B1 output into abstract thinking, source reaction, nuanced opinions, natural style, and longer spoken independence.

sections.title: B2 bridge focus
rows: A B2-style conclusion often shows the practical consequence of your argument.
B2 风格的结论常常说明论证在实践中的结果。
B2 bridge frame: claim, reason, example, counterpoint, and conclusion.
B2 Bridge 框架：主张、原因、例子、反方观点和结论。
End an argument with a practical implication.
用一个实际影响结束论证。
If this argument is right, then learners should not separate understanding from speaking for too long. Every lesson should include at least one sentence that becomes active speech.
如果这个论证是对的，那么学习者就不应该把理解和口语分开太久。每节课都应该至少包含一个变成主动口语的句子。

items.en: A B2-style conclusion often shows the practical consequence of your argument.
items.zh: B2 风格的结论常常说明论证在实践中的结果。

items.en: B2 bridge frame: claim, reason, example, counterpoint, and conclusion.
items.zh: B2 Bridge 框架：主张、原因、例子、反方观点和结论。

items.en: If this argument is right, then learners should not separate understanding from speaking for too long. Every lesson should include at least one sentence that becomes active speech.
items.zh: 如果这个论证是对的，那么学习者就不应该把理解和口语分开太久。每节课都应该至少包含一个变成主动口语的句子。

items.en: I will not rush to sound advanced; I will make the idea clear first.
items.zh: 我不会急着显得高级；我会先把意思说清楚。

items.en: Then I will add nuance: a condition, a limit, a contrast, or a counterpoint.
items.zh: 然后我会加入细腻度：条件、限制、对比或反方观点。

items.en: If the sentence feels too heavy, I can paraphrase it in simpler spoken English.
items.zh: 如果句子感觉太沉重，我可以用更简单的口语英语改说。

items.en: A B2 answer should sound organized, flexible, and alive.
items.zh: B2 回答应该听起来有组织、灵活、有生命力。

items.en: I will record one answer and improve the structure, not only the grammar.
items.zh: 我会录一个回答，并改进结构，而不只是语法。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: End an argument with a practical implication.
lines.zh: 用一个实际影响结束论证。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: If this argument is right, then learners should not separate understanding from speaking for too long. Every lesson should include at least one sentence that becomes active speech.
lines.zh: 如果这个论证是对的，那么学习者就不应该把理解和口语分开太久。每节课都应该至少包含一个变成主动口语的句子。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add nuance or a limitation?
lines.zh: 你能加入细腻度或限制条件吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will add a condition, a contrast, or one fair counterpoint.
lines.zh: 可以。我会加入一个条件、一个对比或一个公平的反方观点。

items.en: End an argument with a practical implication.
items.zh: 用一个实际影响结束论证。

items.en: Answer once in four sentences, then expand it to six or seven sentences.
items.zh: 先用四句话回答一次，然后扩展到六七句话。

items.en: Add one phrase that shows nuance: generally, however, that said, or it depends.
items.zh: 加入一个显示细腻度的短语：generally、however、that said 或 it depends。

items.en: Record the answer and check whether the structure is easy to follow.
items.zh: 录下回答，并检查结构是否容易跟上。

items.en: Reuse the best sentence tomorrow in a new topic.
items.zh: 明天在一个新话题中再次使用最好的句子。
